creator: michal.zielonka.8001@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 238197
patch fixing 8299 isssue

I've met situation described in issue: https://github.com/prusa3d/PrusaSlicer/issues/8299.
I've made fix from comment: https://github.com/prusa3d/PrusaSlicer/issues/8299#issuecomment-1236374198.
And it works again. The problem is connected that prusa slicer 2.5.0 has dependency to wx 3.2.0. And the app is crashing when tries set default language.
